---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A clear description of the feature you'd like.

## Motivation

Why is this feature useful? What problem does it solve?

## Design Considerations

How does this interact with Vera's design principles?

- [ ] Maintains checkability
- [ ] Preserves one canonical form
- [ ] Keeps things explicit
- [ ] Benefits LLM authors (not just human ergonomics)

## Proposed Approach (optional)

If you have ideas about how this could be implemented.
